inputs.label: Noise Level
inputs.businessContext: Measured continuous noise level in A-weighted decibels

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured continuous noise level in A-weighted decibels
businessContext_i18n.tr: A-ağırlıklı desibel cinsinden ölçülen sürekli gürültü seviyesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessener kontinuierlicher Lärmpegel in A-bewerteten Dezibel
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de bruit continu mesuré en décibels pondérés A
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de ruido continuo medido en decibelios ponderados A
businessContext_i18n.ar: مستوى الضوضاء المستمر المقاس بالديسيبل الموزون A

businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée totale d'exposition quotidienne au bruit
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración total diaria de exposición al ruido

inputs.label: Exchange Rate
inputs.businessContext: Decibel exchange rate (3 for equal energy, 5 for OSHA)

businessContext_i18n.en: Decibel exchange rate (3 for equal energy, 5 for OSHA)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Desibel değişim oranı (eşit enerji için 3, OSHA için 5)
businessContext_i18n.de: Dezibel-Austauschrate (3 für gleiche Energie, 5 für OSHA)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'échange de décibels (3 pour énergie égale, 5 pour OSHA)
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de intercambio de decibelios (3 para energía igual, 5 para OSHA)
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل تبادل الديسيبل (3 للطاقة المتساوية، 5 لـ OSHA)

inputs.label: Criterion Level
inputs.businessContext: Permissible noise level for an 8-hour shift

businessContext_i18n.en: Permissible noise level for an 8-hour shift
businessContext_i18n.tr: 8 saatlik vardiya için izin verilen gürültü seviyesi
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de bruit permissible pour un quart de travail de 8 heures
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de ruido permisible para un turno de 8 horas
businessContext_i18n.ar: مستوى الضوضاء المسموح به لنوبة عمل مدتها 8 ساعات

inputs.label: Threshold Level
inputs.businessContext: Level below which noise is ignored (0 = no threshold)

businessContext_i18n.en: Level below which noise is ignored (0 = no threshold)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Altında gürültünün dikkate alınmadığı seviye (0 = eşik yok)
businessContext_i18n.de: Pegel, unterhalb dessen Lärm ignoriert wird (0 = kein Schwellenwert)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau en dessous duquel le bruit est ignoré (0 = pas de seuil)
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel por debajo del cual se ignora el ruido (0 = sin umbral)
businessContext_i18n.ar: المستوى الذي يتم تجاهل الضوضاء دونه (0 = بدون حد)
